statement: Beam AB (length 8 m) is simply supported: pin at A (x=0), roller at B (x=8 m). Two point loads act downward: 400 N at x=2 m and 600 N at x=5 m. The beam is weightless. Find the reactions at A and B.
common_student_errors: Summing both loads as if they act at a single location when computing moments
Computing the moment of the 600 N force using distance from B instead of from A
Forgetting to verify the answer using ΣFy = 0 after finding both reactions
